name: chain__i_am_your_client_amp_sell_me_your_ser
method: i am your client & sell me your service. what are you building this sunday?

stages.task: Generate 5 engagement bait prompts (sell me your service, what are you building, roast my landing page, show me your side project, pitch me in 1 tweet) rotated weekly
Post prompt to X via twitter_warmup_poster.py respecting warmup schedule
After 24h, scrape all replies using twitter_alpha_scraper.py, extract usernames, bios, and pitches
Score replies: has product/service? has audience? potential client or partner? Route hot leads to INBOUND_LEADS.csv
